arts.ttl: O'Brien header extends Everton's unbeaten streak
arts.sum: The defender’s first Everton goal extended the Toffees’ unbeaten streak to seven Premier League matches, while denying their hosts a third straight top-flight win. Everton capitalised on that let-off by clawing themselves level 13 minutes from time, as a well-worked move culminated in O’Brien losing his marker to head home Mykolenko’s cross.

arts.ttl: Brentford's Yoane Wissa breaks personal Premier League record in Everton draw
arts.sum: Brentford forward Yoane Wissa broke a personal scoring record in Wednesday's 1-1 draw against Everton at the Gtech Community Stadium.

arts.ttl: Frank praises ‘outstanding’ Flekken after Brentford draw
arts.sum: Thomas Frank praised goalkeeper Mark Flekken following Brentford’s 1-1 draw with Everton. Flekken made three important saves from Everton striker Beto after the forward ran clean through on goal on each occasion. The Dutchman’s fine display came after consecutive clean sheets, against West Ham and Leicester. arts.ttl: Everton 'dressing room confidence has risen' - Moyes
arts.sum: Everton boss David Moyes says his side is showing "confidence" and "resilience" after extending their unbeaten Premier League run with a 1-1 draw against Brentford.

arts.ttl: David Moyes makes bittersweet Everton claim after Brentford draw
arts.sum: The Blues manager reacts to the draw at Brentford in the Premier League on Wednesday

arts.ttl: David Moyes rues missed chances as Everton battle back to draw at Brentford
arts.sum: Brentford goalkeeper Mark Flekken denied Beto on multiple occasions.

arts.ttl: What David Moyes did right before Everton goal reveals exactly what is behind incredible resurgence
arts.sum: Everton verdict from Joe Thomas after a solid point for the Toffees at Brentford in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Everton may have just unleashed new attacking weapon after press conference claim
arts.sum: Analysis from Chris Beesley after Everton's 1-1 draw at Brentford in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Brentford 1-1 Everton: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Toffees make it seven with Premier League comeback
arts.sum: A resurgent Everton travelled to take on Brentford in the Premier League on Wednesday night, and continued their upward trajectory under David Moyes.

arts.ttl: Beto misses three one-on-one chances as Everton draw at Brentford
arts.sum: Jake O’Brien’s late header rescued a 1-1 draw for Everton at Brentford to extend their unbeaten league run to seven games as Toffees striker Beto missed three one-on-one chances in west London.
